'''Fazak Tsun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] who served as a member of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]]. He underwent a simple [[Escalation|Escalatier Ceremony]] under [[Master Shaper]] [[Ch'Gang Hool]]. However, the [[Priest/Legends|Priests]] found a flaw with his escalation, and declared that the [[Yun'o|Gods]] had withdrawn their favor for some fault of Tsun, and he became a [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]]. [[High Prefect]] [[Yoog Skell]] always suspected that the problem was with Master Hool.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1stm}}
